name: lcyt-bridge
description: LCYT bridge agent — relays production control commands to AMX and Roland over TCP

scripts.build:win: npm run build:bundle && npx @yao-pkg/pkg dist/bundle.cjs --target node18-win-x64 --output dist/lcyt-bridge.exe
scripts.build:mac: npm run build:bundle && npx @yao-pkg/pkg dist/bundle.cjs --target node18-macos-x64 --output dist/lcyt-bridge-mac
scripts.build:linux: npm run build:bundle && npx @yao-pkg/pkg dist/bundle.cjs --target node18-linux-x64 --output dist/lcyt-bridge-linux

author: Juha Itäleino <jsilvanus@gmail.com>
